subcodes.first_line: Say: O God! Verily Thou art the Glory of the heavens and the earth and whatsoever lieth between them, and the God of all who dwell within the dominions of command and creation and whatsoever is other than them. Thou createst whatsoever Thou willest by Thy command. Verily Thou art [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الله اقدس بسم الله الاله ذی الالهین. قل اللهم انک انت سبحان السموات و الارض وما بینهما والهان من فی جبروت الامر والخلق و مادونهما تخلق ما تشاء بامرک انک کنت علی
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity
